text_en: Li Bin described that previously a single advantage such as powertrain form, features like fridge/TV/big sofa, or a hot product could drive enterprise development.
text_orig: 以前通过“一招鲜”，譬如某种动力形式，或是配置上的“冰箱、彩电、大沙发”，亦或是某一款产品的热销，就能让整个企业获得很好的发展势能

text_en: Li Bin said the new competition requires precise product definition, technology, supply chain, cost control, quality, manufacturing, sales service, and brand capabilities as a complete system.
text_orig: 但此刻，比拼的除了是否具有精准的产品定义能力，还要求各家主机厂在技术储备，包括在供应链、成本控制、质量、制造、销售服务等方面，加之品牌层面，具备一个完整的体系竞争能力

title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: NEV aftermarket CAGR is about 20%, projected to reach nearly 3 trillion yuan by 2029.
text_orig: 据前瞻产业研究院预测，新能源汽车后市场年复合增长率约20%，到2029年规模预计近3万亿元。
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: Battery pack cost is a high proportion of total vehicle cost, so replacement cost roughly equals whole vehicle price.
text_orig: 当前主流纯电车型的电池包成本在整车中占比很高，导致电池一旦出现故障，整体更换费用大约等同于整车价格。
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: Automakers generally adopt a 'replace-only, no repair' after-sales policy, even for minor faults.
text_orig: 车企普遍采用“只换不修”的售后模式，小故障、小模块损坏也要整体更换，进一步抬高了维修开销。
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: China has about 400k fuel vehicle maintenance shops, only 20k-30k EV repair shops, of which only 2-3% have three-electric system repair capability.
text_orig: 据中国汽车维修行业协会统计，全国燃油车维保企业约40万家，新能源车维修企业仅2万家至3万家，真正具备“三电系统”维修能力的门店，占比只有2%至3%。
entities: 中国汽车维修行业协会
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: Only about 1/4 of repair personnel can perform battery inspection and repair; most only basic, high-end technicians extremely scarce.
text_orig: 中国汽车维修行业协会调查数据显示，目前只有约1/4的维修人员能够胜任电池检测和维修工作，其中多数仅能开展相对基础的检测和维护，能深度解析三电数据、精准修复故障的高端技师极度稀缺。
entities: 中国汽车维修行业协会
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: The Interim Measures for Management of Waste Power Battery Recycling and Comprehensive Utilization took effect April 1, requiring battery dismantling info to be reported to a national platform.
text_orig: 《新能源汽车废旧动力电池回收和综合利用管理暂行办法》已于4月1日起正式施行，明确要求电池拆解信息报送国家统一平台，并赋予合规维修企业查询权限，有望打破“电池只能回4S店修”的现状。
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: Brand-authorized after-sales service systems will persist; authorized three-electric repair centers will become key for EV-specific parts, bringing accident repair prices back to normal.
text_orig: 品牌授权的售后服务体系会长期存在并占据主要的市场份额，得到授权的三电维修中心会成为动力蓄电池等新能源汽车专属部件维修的重要力量，因此事故车维修价格也会回归正常，传统修理厂通过管理与技术升级转型，仍然可能在市场中占有一席之地。
entities: 中国汽车维修行业协会技术与标准化委员会
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: Future EV repair industry will gradually open compliant market repair rights, fully release technical data, break 4S shop monopoly, and see specialized three-electric centers and chains reduce costs.
text_orig: 未来新能源维修行业将逐步放开合规备案的市场化维修权限，全面放开技术数据，打破4S店独家定价、独家维保的模式。同时行业将迎来精细化分级维修，专业三电维修中心、连锁维保品牌也将逐步崛起，通过市场化竞争降低维修成本，解决车主‘买得起、修不起’的行业痛点。
entities: 物联天下北京能源管理有限责任公司
title: 新能源车维修为啥又贵又难

text_en: In 2024, average curb weight of Chinese passenger cars reached 1704 kg, up from 1312 kg in 2012.
text_orig: 工信部数据显示，2024年我国乘用车新车平均整备质量已达1704公斤，而2012年这一数字仅为1312公斤。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: From January to April 2026, average curb weight of new energy passenger cars was 1939.3 kg, a 27.5% increase from 2020.
text_orig: 根据机动车上险数据统计，2026年1至4月，我国新能源乘用车平均整备质量达1939.3公斤，较2020年增长27.5%。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Several heavy NEV models exceed 2.8 tons: Li Auto L9 Livis, Xiaopeng GX range-extender, NIO ES9, Denza D9 EV 2026, Zunjie V800 over 3.1 tons.
text_orig: 比如，理想L9 Livis超2.8吨，小鹏GX增程版超2.8吨，蔚来ES9行政签名版整备质量超2.9吨，腾势D9 EV2026款超3吨。近日发布的新车尊界V800整备质量超3.1吨，满载7人时总重量达3.8吨。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Expert Li Yanwei said range-extender models are heaviest with average 2373 kg, plug-in hybrids 2144 kg, and pure EVs lightest at 1914 kg.
text_orig: 中国汽车流通协会专家委员会专家李颜伟告诉本报记者，根据其依托车企公开信息搭建的“新能源车配置数据库”统计，从动力类型来看，增程式车型最重，整备质量均值达2373公斤；插电混动车型为2144公斤；纯电动车型相对最轻，为1914公斤。
entities: 中国汽车流通协会专家委员会
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Li Yanwei stated the ideal weight for an ordinary family car should not exceed 2.3 tons, with micro cars around 900 kg and compact cars around 1700 kg.
text_orig: 李颜伟认为，微型代步新能源车的重量应为900公斤左右，紧凑型家用新能源车应为1700公斤上下，普通家用车的重量无需突破2.3吨。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Zhu Yifang said heavy, large vehicles occupy more public resources including road wear, bridge damage, and parking space.
text_orig: 中汽中心首席专家、中国汽车战略与政策研究中心新能源汽车研究部部长朱一方对本报记者说，大重量、大尺寸的车辆挤占了更多社会公共资源，包括车辆对道路、桥梁、车库地坪的损耗，占用的停车空间也更多。
entities: 中国汽车战略与政策研究中心
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: NIO founder Li Bin stated that a 20% increase in vehicle weight leads to a 2.07 times increase in road wear rate.
text_orig: 蔚来创始人李斌公开表示，据测算，车重每增加20%，对路面的破坏率将变成原来的2.07倍。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Every 300 kg increase in curb weight raises electricity consumption by 1.4 kWh per 100 km and reduces range by about 150 km.
text_orig: 据统计，车辆整备质量每增加300公斤，百公里电耗就多出约1.4千瓦时，续航缩短约150公里。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Tesla engineers stated that a 10% increase in vehicle weight may increase braking distance by about 5%, and a 500 kg increase reduces tire life by about 20%.
text_orig: 特斯拉的工程师公开表示，更重的车身让刹车面临巨大的压力。车身重量每增加10%，可能导致刹车距离增加约5%。不仅如此，过重的车身还会缩短轮胎寿命。车重每增加500公斤，轮胎寿命约减少20%
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: A 2025 policy from MIIT and other ministries requires pure electric vehicles over 2710 kg to have energy consumption below 19.1 kWh per 100 km.
text_orig: 工信部、财政部、国家税务总局去年发布的《关于2026―2027年减免车辆购置税新能源汽车产品技术要求的公告》提出，纯电动乘用车百公里电能消耗量应不高于《电动汽车能量消耗量限值第1部分：乘用车》对应车型的电能消耗量限值。也就是说，车重超过2710公斤的纯电车型，电耗必须低于19.1千瓦时/百公里。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Li Yanwei said three weight reduction paths (material substitution, higher battery energy density, integrated drive) could cut 300-400 kg per vehicle.
text_orig: 李颜伟说，技术层面还有三条可量化的减重路径。一是材料替代。用铝合金或高强度钢替代普通钢材，每辆车可减重180至270公斤。二是提升电池能量密度。电池能量密度提升20%至30%，可减轻电池包100至150公斤的重量。三是使用三合一电驱和800V高压架构，可减重约50公斤。“三条路径叠加，理论上每辆车可在现有基础上减重300至400公斤
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

text_en: Tesla reduced connector types from 200 to 6 and total wiring length from 5 km to 1.5 km, and uses rear-floor integrated die casting.
text_orig: 特斯拉将200多种不同接口的连接器统一为6种标准接口，线束总长从5公里缩减至1.5公里；同时大规模应用后底板一体化压铸技术，将数十个零部件合而为一。
title: 你家新能源车要“减肥”吗？

title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

text_en: The local transport bureau refused to issue a ride-hailing transport permit because the vehicle price was below 120,000 yuan.
text_orig: 在办网约车运输证时，却因为车价低于12万元被拒
title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

text_en: The Chifeng government regulation requires ride-hailing vehicles to have a purchase price not less than 120,000 yuan (excluding purchase tax).

title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

text_en: The NPC Standing Committee's Law Committee pointed out in 2025 that setting a price threshold for ride-hailing vehicles constitutes an unreasonable market access condition under the Fair Competition Review Regulations.

entities: 全国人大常委会法工委
title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

text_en: Chifeng authorities responded that they will push for revision of the ride-hailing management regulations.

title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

text_en: Many places still maintain price thresholds for ride-hailing vehicles despite the Fair Competition Review Regulations taking effect in 2024.

title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

title: 低于12万的车不能用作网约车？这是什么道理

text_en: Changan will continue to strengthen safety reminders during driving and take proactive protective measures to help users correctly use assisted driving.

text_en: Safety is the ultimate luxury and the absolute bottom line of intelligence.

text_en: New safety is not just stronger body and more airbags, but active intelligent safety covering physical protection to driving, health, psychology, and privacy in all dimensions.

text_en: Changan will launch active driver incapacitation protection within the year, which monitors driver status and automatically pulls over or drives to a rest area if incapacitation is detected.

text_en: Intelligent assisted driving is still in continuous iteration and upgrade; at the current stage, drivers still need to take responsibility for real-time monitoring and be ready to take over at any time.

title: 赵非：辅助驾驶非全自动驾驶，长安将持续强化行驶中安全提醒

text_en: Resolutely eliminate exaggerated marketing and misleading users by equating assisted driving with autonomous driving, and establish rational safety awareness.

title: 赵非：辅助驾驶非全自动驾驶，长安将持续强化行驶中安全提醒

text_en: Wan Gang emphasized the need to fully summarize demonstration experience and seize opportunities for the future hydrogen energy industry.
text_orig: 要充分总结示范推广经验，抢抓氢能未来产业发展机遇
title: 院士专家共商氢能与燃料电池汽车产业发展大计

text_en: Ouyang Minggao indicated that the next five years will be a critical window for breakthroughs in hydrogen, energy storage, and smart technologies.
text_orig: 未来5年将是氢能、储能与智能技术突破的重要窗口期
title: 院士专家共商氢能与燃料电池汽车产业发展大计

text_en: Ouyang Minggao stated that by 2030, a new architecture of 'main grid + distribution grid + microgrid' will initially form.
text_orig: 2030年初步形成“主电网+配电网+微电网”的新型架构
title: 院士专家共商氢能与燃料电池汽车产业发展大计

text_en: Ouyang Minggao projected that from 2050 to 2060, green hydrogen production will reach 100 to 175 million tons, accounting for 10% to 15% of final energy consumption.
text_orig: 2050年至2060年，绿氢达1至1.75亿吨，其中绿色氢能占终端能源消费10%至15%
title: 院士专家共商氢能与燃料电池汽车产业发展大计

text_en: Zhang Jinhua stated that the global and Chinese hydrogen and fuel cell vehicle industry is entering a new phase of rational and pragmatic development.
text_orig: 当前全球及我国氢能与燃料电池汽车产业正步入理性务实的发展新阶段
title: 院士专家共商氢能与燃料电池汽车产业发展大计

text_en: In 2025, domestic tourist trips reached 6.522 billion, up 16.2% year-on-year; domestic tourist spending reached 6.30 trillion yuan, up 9.5% year-on-year.
text_orig: 文化和旅游部数据显示，2025年国内居民出游人次达65.22亿，同比增长16.2%；国内居民出游花费6.30万亿元，同比增长9.5%。
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: Shenzhou Car Rental held its 2026 strategic upgrade and 'Car Life' new ecosystem launch conference in Beijing.
text_orig: 近日，神州租车2026战略升级暨“车生活”新生态发布会在北京举行。
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: Zhang Junkuo stated that service consumption is becoming an important direction for consumption expansion and upgrading, and that Shenzhou's strategic upgrade seizes the opportunity window.
text_orig: 十四届全国政协委员、中国发展研究基金会理事长、国务院发展研究中心原副主任张军扩表示，服务消费正在成为消费扩容升级的重要方向，交通出行、文化旅游、城市服务、能源补给等场景之间的联动越来越紧密。当前我国服务业发展正迎来三大历史机遇叠加的重要窗口期，神州租车战略升级与“车生活”新生态的发布，是抢抓时代机遇、布局高质量发展的重要实践。
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: Yu Hongfei released Shenzhou's 2026 new strategy, emphasizing that evolving user travel needs require expanding service boundaries through scenario ecosystems.
text_orig: 发布会上，神州租车董事长于洪飞发布神州租车2026全新战略。他表示，伴随用户出行需求不断延展，租车服务的价值也在发生变化。正如智能手机凭借海量应用生态打破信息壁垒、重塑大众生活方式，自驾出行的持续进化，也需要依托场景生态拓展，突破传统用车服务的单一边界，在更多生活场景中为用户提供便捷、高效的出行服务。
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: Shenzhou Car Rental operates nearly 200,000 vehicles and has 190 million registered users.
text_orig: 基于近20万辆运营车辆和1.9亿注册用户
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: Shenzhou launched a 'Car Life' one-stop self-driving travel service system, extending services to energy supply, parking, travel consumption, airport services, and vehicle asset management.
text_orig: 品牌发布“车生活”一站式自驾出行服务体系，将服务从车辆租赁进一步延伸至能源补给、停车通行、文旅消费、候机服务、车辆资产管理等多元场景，开启从传统租车出行服务提供者向全场景汽车生活服务平台升级的新阶段。
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: Yu Hongfei said the 'Car Life' ecosystem is the core business support for the company's transformation, and the company will continue to improve the service system.
text_orig: 于洪飞表示，“车生活”生态是公司转型升级的核心业务支撑，承载着企业适配市场变化、回应用户需求、深耕出行主业的重要使命。未来，公司将持续完善车生活服务体系，为大众出行与产业发展贡献力量。
title: 租车行业打造全场景自驾出行服务体系

text_en: In the first five months of 2026, national passenger car retail sales were 7.1 million units, down nearly 20% year-on-year.
text_orig: 今年前5个月，几百款新车上市，但全国乘用车零售710万辆，同比下降近两成
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: The auto industry profit margin in the first quarter of 2026 was only 3.2%, a new low and significantly below the national average of 4.9% for industrial enterprises above designated size.
text_orig: 汽车行业利润率一季度仅有3.2%，再创新低，明显低于全国规上工业企业平均利润率的4.9%
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: Automobile manufacturing revenue in the first five months of 2026 was 24,128 billion yuan, a slight decrease year-on-year.
text_orig: 汽车制造业营业收入24128亿元，同比微降
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: In 2025, sales of new energy vehicles priced above 300,000 yuan increased by 47.2% year-on-year, outpacing the overall market growth of 18.3%.
text_orig: 去年，30万元以上新能源车销量同比增长47.2%，高于整体市场18.3%的增速
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: In May 2026, passenger vehicle exports reached 784,000 units, up 75.1% year-on-year, accounting for 35% of total passenger vehicle manufacturer sales.
text_orig: 今年5月，乘用车出口78.4万辆，同比增长75.1%，占乘用车厂商销量的35%
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: From January to May 2026, cumulative passenger vehicle exports were 4.238 million units, up 48.7% year-on-year.
text_orig: 1—5月累计出口423.8万辆，同比增长48.7%
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: Wang Xia stated that price wars have caused 'serious internal injuries' to companies and 'aesthetic fatigue' among consumers.
text_orig: 连续几年的价格战不仅让企业‘内伤严重’，也让消费者‘审美疲劳’
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: Wang Xia argued that the era of simply shipping cars by ro-ro ships is over; true globalization must practice the concept of win-win cooperation and the method of 'ecological rooting'.
text_orig: 单靠滚装船拉货出海的时代已成过去时，真正的全球化必须践行合作共赢的理念和‘生态扎根’的办法
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: In the past year, more than 30 large models have been deployed in vehicles, and some call 2026 the AI元年 (year zero) for the automotive industry.
text_orig: 据不完全统计，近一年来有超过30个大模型上车，甚至有人说2026年是汽车产业的AI元年
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: Wang Xia emphasized that the intelligent electric vehicle industry has entered a rapid convergence period, and the extremely challenging period will last at least five more years.
text_orig: 智能电动汽车已进入快速收敛期，极具挑战的非常时期至少还要持续五年
title: 涉及价值战、全球化和AI，王侠发出汽车行业灵魂“三问”

text_en: Honda founder Kawamoto Nobuhiko and other senior executives publicly called for the ouster of current CEO Toshihiro Mibe.
text_orig: 以川本信彦为代表的多位本田元老公开弹劾本田现任CEO三部敏宏。
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: Toshihiro Mibe said, 'We have no chance of winning against the strength of Chinese automakers.'
text_orig: “面对中国车企实力，我们毫无胜算。”
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: Honda sold only about 60,000 electric vehicles globally in 2025, less than 2% of total sales.
text_orig: 2025年在全球市场仅销售6万余辆电动车，占公司总销量不足2%。
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: Honda's China sales fell for five consecutive years from a peak of 1,626,972 units in 2020 to 645,345 units in 2025.
text_orig: 早在2020年时，东风本田、广汽本田销量就已双双突破80万辆，合力推动本田在华销量达到巅峰，共销售1626972辆。此后，...2025年，销量仅剩645345辆，相较巅峰时跌去近100万辆规模。
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: In the first five months of 2026, Honda's monthly China sales were only around 20,000 units in three months; May sales were 28,729 units.
text_orig: 2026年前5个月中，本田有3个月在华销量仅2万余辆，4月、5月皆遭遇腰斩式跌幅。5月销售28729辆，不及吉利星愿、特斯拉Model Y等单款车型的月度销量。
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: Toshihiro Mibe conceded that the goal of phasing out fuel vehicles by 2040 is unrealistic and has been cancelled.
text_orig: “此前提出的2040年全面淘汰燃油车目标并不现实，公司已经取消这一目标。”
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: The 'Ye' brand's first model, Dongfeng Honda S7, priced at 259,900 and 309,900 yuan, never exceeded 500 monthly sales.
text_orig: 一年后，“烨”品牌首款车型东风本田S7更是以两款车型25.99万元和30.99万元的定价，成为价格战中的“清流”，上市至今，本田S7的月销量从未突破过500辆。
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: UBS auto analyst said, 'If the foreign partner is pushed to the passenger seat in cooperation with China, everything becomes risky.'
text_orig: 瑞银汽车分析师直言：“如果外方在与中国合作中被挤到‘副驾驶座’上，一切就变得充满风险。”
title: 亏损、内斗、失守中国市场，本田遭遇内忧外患

text_en: BYD's 2025 revenue exceeded 800 billion yuan.
text_orig: 2025年，比亚迪营收突破8000亿元
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: BYD had over 120,000 R&D personnel at the end of 2025.
text_orig: 2025年年末，公司研发人员数量超过12万名
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: Wang Chuanfu stated that second-generation blade battery capacity is insufficient and is increasing by 20,000 to 30,000 sets per month.
text_orig: 目前二代刀片电池产能还不够，正以每月两万到三万套的增量爬升
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: BYD launched the second-generation blade battery and flash charging technology on March 5, 2026, enabling charging from 10% to 70% in 5 minutes.
text_orig: 今年3月5日，比亚迪推出第二代刀片电池及闪充技术。在常温条件下，第二代刀片电池从10%充至70%电量，充电时间可短至5分钟
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: On May 28, 2026, BYD released China's first 4nm smart driving chip supporting L3 and L4 autonomous driving.
text_orig: 5月28日，比亚迪发布国内首款4nm（纳米）制程智驾芯片，支持L3、L4级别自动驾驶
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: Wang Chuanfu said there are 3.15 million BYD vehicles with smart driving features globally, generating 200 million kilometers of driving data daily.
text_orig: 全球现有315万辆带智驾功能的比亚迪汽车，每天有两亿公里行驶里程的数据
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: Wang Chuanfu indicated that L3 and L4 autonomous driving will arrive ahead of schedule, and BYD has prepared driving training centers worldwide.
text_orig: 随着AI的快速发展，L3、L4级别的自动驾驶将会提前落地，比亚迪在芯片、算法、数据、生态等方面已经做好了充足准备，同时已布局欧洲、南美、东南亚、中东等全球多地驾驶训练中心
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: BYD's 2025 overseas revenue was 310.741 billion yuan, accounting for nearly 40% of total revenue.
text_orig: 公司2025年境外收入达3107.41亿元，占比接近四成
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: Wang Chuanfu said the 2026 overseas sales target of 1.6 million vehicles is likely to be exceeded.
text_orig: 2026年年初为海外市场制定了160万辆的销量目标，目前看大概率能够超额完成
title: 比亚迪：已为实现更高级别自动驾驶做好准备

text_en: Lantu has secured a market position in the high-end new energy vehicle price range of 300,000 to 700,000 RMB.
text_orig: 岚图不仅站稳了高端新能源30万至70万元的价格区间市场
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: State-owned auto companies have undertaken reform actions including the formation of New Changan, GAC's 'Panyu Action', and SAIC's integration of the 'Large Passenger Vehicle' segment.
text_orig: 从新长安组建，到广汽“番禺行动”，再到上汽整合“大乘用车”板块
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Lantu pursues a 'long-termist entrepreneurship' path backed by a central state-owned enterprise, avoiding both the burning cash of new forces and the technology borrowing of the joint venture era.
text_orig: 岚图所探索的，既非新势力的“烧钱狂奔”，也非合资时代的“技术拿来”，而是一条央企背书下的“长期主义创业”之路。
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Lantu has proven over six years that it is possible to simultaneously possess the stability and resource integration of a state-owned enterprise and the agility and innovation impulse of a startup.
text_orig: 岚图用六年证明，这种“既要又要”并非不可能。
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Lantu leads the industry in the growth rate of technology patents.
text_orig: 技术专利增速却做到了行业领先
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Lantu has built an agile organization and used digital technology to empower efficiency reform.
text_orig: 通过打造敏捷型组织、用数字化技术赋能效率变革，有效激发了组织活力
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Lantu cooperates deeply with Huawei in software, forming a hybrid model of 'hardware self-controlled, software controllable'.
text_orig: 通过与华为深度合作，形成“硬件自控、软件可控”的混合模式
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Only when the headquarters 'can hear the sound of gunfire' can it 'accurately make decisions'.
text_orig: 总部只有“听得见炮声”，才能“拍得准板子”
title: 国资车企何以突出重围？

text_en: Yuejiang Technology's robots are sold to over 100 countries and used in factories of more than 80 Fortune 500 companies.
text_orig: 企业的机器人产品已销往100多个国家和地区，在超过80家世界500强企业的工厂中应用。
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: Yuejiang's first-generation collaborative robot faced a temperature issue in Japan where the body temperature of 50-60°C was considered a problem.
text_orig: 机器人的运行温度为什么这么高？
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: JPT Photonics encountered a trust crisis in Germany due to the stereotype that Chinese industrial equipment is cost-effective but unstable.
text_orig: 德国客户对中国工业设备有着‘性价比高但稳定性不足’的刻板印象。
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: JPT Photonics passed all German compliance tests on the first attempt by integrating requirements during product design.
text_orig: 最终一次性通过所有测试。
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: JPT Photonics holds over 70% of the global market share for laser resistor trimmers.
text_orig: 杰普特激光调阻机全球市场占有率超七成
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: Topstar's customer in Mexico, after using its robots and injection molding machines, requested a full robotic automation production line for a new factory.
text_orig: 当客户新建工厂时，主动提出希望拓斯达为其提供完整的机器人自动化产线解决方案。
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: Yuejiang's unmanned coffee cart in the UAE reduces labor costs by 70%.
text_orig: 越疆无人咖啡车在阿联酋实现人力成本降低70%
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: Pudu Technology added a robotic arm and dexterous hand to its delivery robot to press elevator buttons, overcoming regulations that forbid elevator control system modifications.
text_orig: 给机器人加上机械臂和灵巧手，让它能像人一样自己按电梯。
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: WeRide designed a comprehensive thermal management system and self-developed sensor cleaning system for autonomous taxis in Abu Dhabi due to extreme heat and salt fog.
text_orig: 团队专门设计综合热管理系统，并自研传感器清洁系统

text_en: WeRide has deployed autonomous vehicles in over 40 cities across 12 countries.
text_orig: 文远知行已在12个国家超40个城市部署自动驾驶车辆。
title: 中国智造出海进入新阶段

text_en: JPT Photonics set up core spare parts warehouses in Singapore, the United States, and Germany, delivering to customers within 48 hours.
text_orig: 在新加坡、美国、德国设立核心备件仓，可以48小时内送达客户现场

text_en: Topstar established a North Vietnam branch, a Mexico office, and an Indonesia technical service center in 2023.
text_orig: 拓斯达2023年成立了越南北宁分公司、墨西哥办事处、印尼技术服务中心

text_en: As of the end of 2025, the total assets of 24 auto finance companies in China reached 914.448 billion yuan, up 6.94% year-on-year.
text_orig: 截至2025年末，全国24家汽车金融公司资产规模为9144.48亿元，同比上升6.94%

text_en: New energy vehicle and used car loan scales grew 29.14% and 16.89% year-on-year respectively.
text_orig: 新能源汽车和二手车贷款规模持续增长，同比分别增长29.14%和16.89%

text_en: The industry's average capital adequacy ratio was 26.03%, average liquidity ratio was 247.08%, and average non-performing loan ratio was 0.75%.
text_orig: 行业资本充足率为26.03%，平均流动性比率达247.08%，平均不良贷款率为0.75%

text_en: The special action runs from April to June 2026, with three phases: intelligence gathering by end of April, centralized enforcement by end of May, and public exposure of typical cases by end of June.

text_en: The new electric vehicle safety standard requires physical disconnection of the high-voltage circuit between the vehicle's high-voltage system or drive system and the rechargeable energy storage system, and defines the 'one-key power-off' device as a physical disconnection device.
text_orig: 电动汽车安全新国标要求实现整车高压回路或驱动系统与可充电储能系统之间高压回路的物理断开，并首次将“一键断电”装置定义为物理断电装置
title: 加固安全防线 电动汽车两项新国标将落地

text_en: The new battery standard changes the technical requirement from providing a thermal event alarm signal 5 minutes before fire or explosion to requiring no fire, no explosion (still requires alarm), and added bottom impact test and fast charge cycle safety test.
text_orig: 电池新国标进一步明确待测电池温度要求、上下电状态、观察时间、整车测试条件，技术要求从此前的着火、爆炸前5分钟提供热事件报警信号等，调整为不起火、不爆炸（仍需报警）
title: 加固安全防线 电动汽车两项新国标将落地

text_en: The new battery standard adds a bottom impact test and a fast charge cycle safety test requiring no fire or explosion after 300 fast charge cycles.
text_orig: 新增底部撞击测试，考查电池底部受到撞击后的防护能力；新增快充循环后安全测试，300次快充循环后进行外部短路测试，要求不起火、不爆炸等。
title: 加固安全防线 电动汽车两项新国标将落地

text_en: Han Guangshuai, a Ph.D. from Tongji University, stated that the two compulsory national standards will accelerate the restructuring of vehicle manufacturers, expand the advantages of compliant companies, and curb homogeneous low-price competition, benefiting industry health.

title: 加固安全防线 电动汽车两项新国标将落地

text_en: Wu Kai, chief scientist of CATL and academician of the Chinese Academy of Engineering, said that after the new electric vehicle safety standard takes effect, the spontaneous combustion rate of new energy vehicles in China will be an order of magnitude lower than that of traditional fuel vehicles.

title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

text_en: Mainstream liquid lithium batteries are approaching their theoretical energy density limit, and solid-state batteries have not yet been mass-produced.

title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

text_en: Zhang Xiang from North China University of Technology said that some automakers emphasize stacking features like refrigerators, TVs, and even kitchen appliances, which increases vehicle weight.
text_orig: 一些车企在宣传过程中把功能堆叠作为重点，冰箱、彩电甚至厨房用具都配置到车中，这些自然会增加车重。
title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

text_en: The national standard 'Energy Consumption Limits for Electric Vehicles Part 1: Passenger Cars' came into effect on January 1, 2026, specifying electricity consumption limits for different vehicle weights.
text_orig: 2026年1月1日起实施的《电动汽车能量消耗量限值 第1部分：乘用车》国家标准，明确了不同车重下的电耗限值
title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

text_en: Whether new energy vehicles can enjoy reduced vehicle purchase tax is linked to the electricity consumption limits.
text_orig: 新能源汽车能否享受减免车辆购置税也与限值挂钩
title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

text_en: Zhang Xiang emphasized that under policy guidance, simply stacking batteries for long range will be gradually blocked, and lightweighting remains an important development trend.
text_orig: 在政策导向下，未来简单堆电池换取长续航的路子会逐渐被堵上，轻量化依然是汽车工业的重要发展趋势。
title: 新能源汽车不能再胖了

text_en: Using new energy trucks in county markets saves nearly 2,000 yuan per month in transport costs, equivalent to earning over 20,000 yuan extra per year.

text_en: New energy vehicles in rural areas are seen as a significant driving force for rural revitalization and agricultural modernization.

text_en: Issues such as uneven distribution of charging infrastructure and lack of after-sales service points in rural areas are expected to be gradually resolved with continued policy support.

text_en: Local governments have increased investment in rural road construction, widening narrow village roads and repairing damaged surfaces to accommodate new energy vehicles.

text_orig: 中国军工企业名单并非制裁名单。被列入中国军工企业名单不会影响本集团正常开展业务，不会影响本集团与任何人（美国国防部除外）进行业务往来；...且中国军工企业名单并未限制进行本公司证券交易。
title: 比亚迪最新公告

text_en: BYD indicated it may initiate review proceedings or litigation to be removed from the Chinese military company list.
text_orig: 若本公司后续启动复核程序或在必要时采取诉讼以将本公司从中国军工企业名单中删除，本公司将于适当时候发布进一步的公告。
title: 比亚迪最新公告

text_en: Alibaba, Baidu, WuXi AppTec, and NIO issued statements calling the designation baseless and a mistake, and will take all feasible legal actions.
text_orig: 阿里巴巴、百度、药明康德、蔚来等4家港股上市公司发布公告，集体亮明态度：无任何依据，是个错误，并将采取一切可行的法律行动。
title: 比亚迪最新公告

text_en: Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian expressed firm opposition and urged the U.S. to correct the error, pledging necessary measures.
text_orig: 中方一贯坚决反对美方泛化国家安全概念，划设各类名目的歧视性清单，无理打压中国企业。我们敦促美方纠正错误做法，停止对中国企业的无理打压行径。中方将采取必要措施，坚定维护中国企业的正当合法权益。
title: 比亚迪最新公告

text_en: In January 2021, Xiaomi was added to the U.S. DoD Chinese military company list, and after nearly four months of litigation, a U.S. court overturned the designation in May 2021.
text_orig: 2021年1月，小米被美国国防部列入针对“军事企业”的相关清单。后来，经过近4个月的诉讼，2021年5月25日，美国哥伦比亚特区地方法院颁发了最终判决，解除了美国国防部对于小米公司属于中国军方公司的认定。
entities: United States District Court for the District of Columbia

text_en: In April 2026, China's national used car transaction volume was 1.6712 million units, down 6.73% month-on-month and 1.76% year-on-year.

title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: Tu Jianjun stated that green, compliant, transparent, traceable, and efficient recycling have become common standards for international新能源布局, and the industry needs localized models adapted to different regional policies.
text_orig: 绿色、合规、透明、溯源、高效循环，已成为各国新能源产业国际化布局的通用准则。在严苛的国际合规标准与成本约束双重背景下，行业需要构建适配不同区域政策的本地化布局模式。
entities: 博众智合能源转型中国区
title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: An industry expert noted that the biggest pain point in European battery recycling is the high economic cost of using recycled materials, especially moving from black mass to cathode materials and back into vehicle batteries.
text_orig: 如何在欧盟境内找到合适的回收企业，并把回收材料一步步从黑粉走到正极材料，再回到整车厂的电池里面，是最大的挑战。
title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: Cao Sijia of Huayou Recycling said that under the Basel Convention, black mass from European batteries cannot be directly shipped back to China, and the company partners with local recyclers in Europe.
text_orig: 在欧洲，由于落地难、成本高、收料难，我们选择与当地回收公司合作、各自发挥优势。而在处理欧洲动力电池产出的黑粉时，由于《巴塞尔公约》的限制，黑粉无法直接运回国内。
entities: 华友循环科技有限公司
title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: Cao Sijia added that Thailand and Malaysia are tightening restrictions on importing waste batteries and black mass, requiring local downstream metallurgical facilities.
text_orig: 泰国、马来西亚等地目前已逐步深化限制废旧电池及黑粉的进口，甚至要求企业在当地配套后段冶金等处理设施
title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: Cao Yuancheng of Wuhan Ruishenmei stated that Chinese companies must understand local regulations from the root, but are fully capable in technology and industrial chain.
text_orig: 回收企业必须从根源和原则上去理解当地的法规，而在技术和产业链生态上，中国‘出海’企业完全具备实力。
entities: 武汉瑞科美新能源有限责任公司
title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: Li Chengyue of China Resources Battery noted that under the EU EPR system, Chinese battery exporters pay compliance fees and give up property rights to waste batteries and recycled materials.
text_orig: 目前，欧盟EPR制度不仅作为原则要求存在，更约定了明确的履约路径。对于绝大多数中国电池出口企业而言，这意味着在向欧洲的生产者责任延伸组织支付合规费用的同时，也放弃了对于废旧电池及再生资源的物权。
entities: 中资环电池科技（苏州）有限公司
title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: Fang Weiquan of NRDC said that challenges include scattered recycling networks, low collection efficiency, and inconsistent standards, and called for international coordination on standards, material certification, and data traceability.

title: 动力电池回收面临国际化考验

text_en: If negotiations go smoothly, the Sunderland plant will start producing Chery models as early as the 2027 fiscal year (April 2027).

text_en: The Sunderland plant is the largest vehicle manufacturing base in the UK, with a peak annual capacity of 600,000 vehicles.
text_orig: 坐落于英格兰东北部的桑德兰工厂是英国本土体量最大整车制造基地，巅峰时期年产能可达60万辆。

entities: 西班牙加利西亚自治区

text_orig: 今年4月,我国汽车整车出口93.9万辆，环比增长20.3%，同比增长51.3%；1-4月，汽车整车出口325.1万辆，同比增长50.6%。

text_en: The automotive industry in 2026 is experiencing a 'Token moment'.
text_orig: 2026年汽车行业正经历Token时刻
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Token is the smallest discrete unit for processing information in large models.
text_orig: Token是大模型处理信息的最小离散单元
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Huawei Cloud's Token service reduces AI project construction period from traditional 2 months to 1 minute.
text_orig: 以华为云Token服务为例，其创新的服务模式将AI项目建设周期从传统的2个月大幅压缩至1分钟
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Token service can control latency within 28 milliseconds for autonomous driving decisions.
text_orig: Token服务可以凭借其强大的计算能力与高效的算法优化，可将时延控制在28ms以内
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Token service adopts a 'pay-as-you-use' model.
text_orig: 即开即用、按用付费
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Camera image data is converted into standardized token sequences.
text_orig: 摄像头捕捉的图像数据被转化为标准化的Token序列
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Lidar point cloud data is divided into spatial tokens representing three-dimensional structures.
text_orig: 激光雷达的点云数据也被划分为空间Token，这些Token能够精准描绘出周围环境的三维立体结构
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？

text_en: Vehicle data collected via OBD devices is encrypted and chained to generate tokenized credentials.
text_orig: 通过车载OBD设备，车辆的行驶数据、维修保养记录、零部件更换信息等被实时采集，并加密上链生成Token化凭证
title: Token服务能力提升，如何赋能汽车业？
